content: Backend: install supabase lib, configure .env with Supabase keys, random OTP generation
Backend: Supabase Storage helper + generic upload endpoint, migrate prescriptions/lab-reports/profile-images/provider-docs
Frontend: shortened landing description + Ranger CTA → small text link
Frontend: SOS Vault feature (top-right access + dedicated page)
Frontend: Zomato-style Location picker with GPS + search + saved locations + reverse geocoding (Nominatim)
Frontend: notification red dot only when unread
Frontend: rename Emergency card to 'Emergency SOS'
Update Terms/Privacy/Contact pages from PDFs + company info
Migrate frontend uploads (profile photo, prescriptions, lab reports, KYC docs) to /api/uploads/base64
